Name: ARMOR_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters relating to equippable armor.

Fields.Name: Armor ID
Fields.Description: The ID for this armor set. Do not forget this when creating custom armor.

Fields.Name: Armor Type
Fields.Description: The type of armor this is.

Fields.Name: Armor Category
Fields.Description: The category this armor belongs to.

Fields.Name: Armor Model ID
Fields.Description: The model to use for this armor.

Fields.Name: Armor Model Gender
Fields.Description: The gender to use for this armor model.

Fields.Name: Cloth Collidable ID
Fields.Description: The cloth collidable parameters to use for this armor.

Fields.Name: Armor Interference Data ID
Fields.Description: The parameters for armor interference for this armor.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon ID to use for this armor.

Fields.Name: Armor Reinforce ID
Fields.Description: The reinforcement parameters to use for this armor.

Fields.Name: Defence Scaling: Status Effect
Fields.Description: The status effect multiplier applied to defence power.

Fields.Name: Defence Scaling: Slash
Fields.Description: The slash multiplier applied to defence power.

Fields.Name: Defence Scaling: Thrust
Fields.Description: The slash multiplier applied to defence power.

Fields.Name: Defence Scaling: Strike
Fields.Description: The slash multiplier applied to defence power.

Fields.Name: Requirement: STR
Fields.Description: The strength requirement to wield this armor.

Fields.Name: Requirement: DEX
Fields.Description: The dexterity requirement to wield this armor.

Fields.Name: Requirement: INT
Fields.Description: The intelligence requirement to wield this armor.

Fields.Name: Requirement: FTH
Fields.Description: The faith requirement to wield this armor.

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: The weight of this armor.

Fields.Name: Durability
Fields.Description: The durability of this armor

Fields.Name: Repair Cost
Fields.Description: The repair cost (in souls) for this armor.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: The poise value for this armor.

Fields.Name: Arm Position: Side Opening %
Fields.Description: The side opening percentage of the arms when this armor is equipped.

Fields.Name: Arm Position: Armpit Raise
Fields.Description: The arm pit level of the arms when this armor is equipped.

Fields.Name: Item Discovery Correction %
Fields.Description: The correction percentage to apply to Item Discovery when this armor is equipped.

Fields.Name: Hit Material
Fields.Description: The hit material to use when this armor is equipped.

Fields.Name: Broken SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use when this armor is broken

Fields.Name: Broken Sound Type
Fields.Description: The sound type to use when this armor is broken.
